summary: REINFORCE with a baseline reaches an average return of 0.60 on a 5x5 gridworld, far above the random policy's -1.98. The RLHF reward model, trained only on Bradley-Terry preference labels, hits 95% held-out preference accuracy (corr 0.82 with the hidden true reward); optimising a policy against the learned reward beats the base policy under the TRUE reward on 83% of contexts.
data_source: synthetic gridworld MDP + synthetic Bradley-Terry preferences (offline)
